title: YouTube-tool handoff doc generated by Claude Code
html:
Claude Code confirmation it generated YOUTUBE-TOOL-HANDOFF-2026-02-04.md on Yahir's Desktop covering: immediate next action, Render service ID + app password + Supabase URLs, today's git history, copy-paste E2E smoke test, Render API commands, local dev npm scripts, troubleshooting, today's changelog, video-pipeline + auth architecture, and Definition-of-Done checklist — the youtube tool handoff artifact from a Claude Code session.

TL;DR

  • Claude Code auto-generated a comprehensive handoff doc for YouTube tool (the Rankett video-pipeline microservice).
  • Handoff captures full deploy state: Render config, Supabase schema, E2E smoke test, troubleshooting playbook.
  • Pattern: Claude-Code-generated handoff docs as the new "leave-yourself-a-note" format for multi-day builds.

claude code · rankett · youtube tool · render · supabase
